M-078.NAME: premium-frontend-qa-gates
M-078.owns: Premium frontend verification gates for screenshots, performance, reduced-motion, responsive safety, and release readiness.
M-078.purpose: Prevent premium visual work from shipping with usability, performance, or MyGRACE drift regressions.

exports.gate-screenshot-matrix: Public, auth, user, admin, email-template preview screenshot matrix.
exports.gate-performance-budget: Bundle, Lighthouse/Web Vitals, canvas CPU, and motion budget checks.
exports.gate-accessibility-motion: Reduced-motion, focus-visible, contrast, no-overlap, and keyboard reachability checks.

constraints.constraint-1: QA gates must fail on visual overlap, horizontal scroll, broken reduced-motion, or protected deploy/install drift.
constraints.constraint-2: Authenticated protected-route screenshot gaps must be explicit rather than implied as covered.
constraints.constraint-3: Release candidate gate must include MyGRACE lint and XML parse.

acceptance-metrics.metric-2: User/admin builds and git diff --check pass.
acceptance-metrics.metric-3: Protected deploy/install/backend/runtime guard remains empty unless a separate approved deploy phase exists.
acceptance-metrics.metric-4: Phase-65 release-candidate verification is designed with full premium regression smokes, builds, backend email tests, screenshot/static evidence, release notes, live-gap recording, MyGRACE checks, and protected-surface guard.

verification-design-phase65.target-1: Phase-65 must run the complete premium regression train from Phase-55 through Phase-64 plus Phase-60 QA, user/admin builds, and backend email tests before any release-candidate decision.
verification-design-phase65.target-2: Release-candidate evidence must separate local/static proof from clean-deploy-only proof, especially authenticated protected-route screenshots and delivered Resend email rendering.
verification-design-phase65.target-3: Release notes must be generated for premium Matrix frontend, responsive adaptation, compactness, visible logos, and premium Resend templates without tagging or pushing a release during verification design.
verification-design-phase65.target-4: Protected deploy/install/nginx/docker-compose/VPN/MTProto/runtime/provider surfaces must remain unchanged unless a separate approved release/deploy phase explicitly owns that change.

evidence.item: 2026-06-04: node scripts/phase60-premium-qa-smoke.mjs passed with required PremiumQAGates markers.
2026-06-04: frontend and frontend-admin production builds passed; dist artifact budgets are below Phase-60 limits.
2026-06-04: Phase-52/55/56/57/58/59 regression smokes passed and are wired into the Phase-60 QA gate.
2026-06-04: XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard passed.

M-078.hotspot: H-065: Premium QA gates must include screenshots, performance budgets, reduced-motion, no-overlap, and protected deploy/install guards.
